signals.name: USD Index
signals.context: 20d ret +1.6% — dollar strength headwind for EM/commodities

signals.name: Semiconductors
signals.context: 20d ret +6.5% — semis leading; AI demand intact

signals.name: Financials
signals.context: 20d ret +3.2% — financials leading; curve steepening favourable

risks.name: Volatility Regime
risks.description: VIX at 19.4. Calm regime; vol suppression in force.
risks.invalidation: VIX mean-reverts below 18 and holds for 5 sessions

risks.name: Credit Stress
risks.description: HYG 20d +0.5%. Credit broadly constructive; no systemic signal.

risks.name: Rate Re-pricing
risks.description: TLT 20d +1.8%. Rates stable to falling; supportive for equities.
risks.invalidation: TLT stabilises or rallies; 10Y yield falls below recent range

risks.name: Growth Slowdown
risks.invalidation: Copper and IWM both sustain positive 20d momentum

risks.name: Inflation Re-pricing
risks.description: TIPS 20d -0.2%. Inflation expectations contained; Fed credibility intact.
risks.invalidation: TIPS underperform nominal treasuries; breakevens fall

risks.name: Dollar Headwind
risks.description: UUP 20d +1.6%. Strong dollar compresses EM earnings and commodity prices.
risks.invalidation: DXY loses 20d momentum; UUP 20d return goes negative

risks.name: Complacency Risk
risks.description: SPY +-0.6% / 20d with vol 0.96%/day. Risk/return balance reasonable; no excess complacency signal.
risks.invalidation: Vol expands above 1.2%/day or SPY 20d return pulls back below +3%
